title: rubus × lepidiformis
intro: Rubus × lepidiformis, also known as the Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus, commonly found in the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Rubus × lepidiformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. Rubus × lepidiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
